causalAutopsy.notes: PROVENANCE_COVERAGE ships pending:ACT-NNNN trackers as source constants but validated them against the machine-local, unreplicated evolution action queue. Latent on a single-machine install; surfaced 2026-07-23 when the Mac Mini (high-water ACT-1119) flagged all 49 entries citing ACT-1193, which lives on the Laptop (high-water ACT-1211). evolutionActions stateSync cannot converge them — the journal-apply side is an explicitly unbuilt rollout stage.
